581201.Content:
Boyce reaches out to his younger self, but the child does not respond.
—He dissolves into a blinding beam of white light within the illusion.

2002401.Content:
You hear a sound coming from not far away, rising and falling.
You first thought it was just the bleating of Caprahorns, but upon closer listening, you pick up a faint call for help...

2002402.Content:
You bring the priest named Heliodor back to the Scholar Camp. He tries to escape several times along the way, but each time you catch him.
Lisette is startled when she sees the Heliodor you dragged back, then immediately becomes furious.

2002501.Content: There was the brief sound of a weapon being unsheathed, and the informer's voice stopped abruptly.

2002502.Content: The Imagine Seed was activated, and a clear image appeared in my mind—

2002503.Content:
The soldiers skillfully carried away the bodies of Reiner and the others, barely sparing us a glance.
Their black military boots trampled the torn List on the ground, as if it were garbage that had never held any meaning.

2002601.Content:
I arrived at the Garrison Outpost with fifty guards disguised as adventurers.
Reynold called out the soldiers inside and loudly questioned them about the mine.
They laughed, acting as if they didn't care at all.

2002602.Content:
After intercepting the pursuing soldiers, I didn't waste time fighting, but rather retreated immediately,
heading toward Asterleeds.
When I reached the city entrance, I saw Jerrad and the others waiting anxiously.
Seeing me return safely, everyone smiled and breathed a sigh of relief.

3000801.Content: As you and Lure chatted while fishing, time flew by...

3000901.Content: Perhaps it really was the fishing spot. Soon after casting her line, Sylvaine caught a half-meter long Bluefin Gurnard. A smile appeared on her face for the first time in a long while.

3001001.Content: Sylvaine stares intently at the float, while Lure rubs his chin absent-mindedly, clearly trying to make up a "third stage" of fishing...

3001002.Content:
Lure's hearty laughter echoes through the Fallen Valley, startling the fish in the underground river into hiding.
As a result, the three Longnose Gar Sylvaine caught earlier became the only spoils of our journey...

3001003.Content: You told Lure what had happened...

3001101.Content: The Crimson Foxen has once again been defeated by the joint efforts of the Adventurers. Yet just as you are preparing to leave, you discover...

3001102.Content: Meanwhile, Orlando called over Alexia and carefully examined the girl's body...

3001103.Content:
After a short while, Orlando hands you a potion brewed from the Fullmoon Soulgrass.
You help the girl to her feet and carefully feed her the potion...

3001104.Content: You bring Cheryl back to the camp. Just as she said, a group of people arrive shortly after to take her away...

3001201.Content: With a mournful cry, the Flamehorn crashes to the ground, its massive antlers growing dim...

3001202.Content: A brilliant flash of light washes over you, and you feel yourself "floating" in the sky. You catch sight of a mountain-sized Caprahorn slam against an equally massive Golem...

3001301.Content: Afterward, the three of you return to Asterleeds, and Edward expresses his heartfelt gratitude to you on behalf of the Pioneer Bureau...

3001501.Content: Afterwards, you took the three awakened members of the Adventurer squad and left the Cabbage Mission's hideout without any obstruction.

3001901.Content: With the combined efforts of the Adventurers, the Cabbage Kingpin was defeated. But as the dust settled, she was nowhere to be seen...

3002501.Content: Isabella reached out towards the Illusory Bloom. You closed your eyes and let your guard down...

3002502.Content:
"Isabella... promise me... you will live on..."
"Promise me..."

3002601.Content: The next day, I went to the fishing spot, planning to help old Demi win the competition.

3002602.Content:
The competition started and fish were being thrown into the bucket one after the other. I was on a roll!
When the match finally ended and the catch was counted, it turned out I had won...

3002701.Content:
When I went back and told Paton and Asheley, neither of them believed me. They insisted on finding the other person to ask them directly.
So I brought them here to verify my story... Davi came along too, to watch the fun.

3002801.Content:
So I took Duffy to the entrance of Lallipar and hung a sign around his neck.
It read, "I will never be a scammer again!" Duffy was so embarrassed he wished he could just sink into the ground.
He probably won't be scamming anyone anymore.

3002901.Content:
The moment she took the seal,
Sabine's relieved expression turned blank,
then returned to the coldness she had when we first met.

3003101.Content:
A wisp of fine, ash-like mist escaped from the seal of the bone cylinder placed on the ground.
It swirled in the air, weaving into eerie shapes,
before finally settling into a swirling triangle.
A moment later, it was blown away by a gust of wind...

3003301.Content: You informed Evelyn about the malfunctioning Mechcore Oculoid encountered in the Gloomy Depths...

3003302.Content: Soon, Anthony had gathered all the parts on the list...

3003501.Content: After waiting for an unknown amount of time, you saw the consultant returning with Carojé on their back.

3003502.Content: You told them about what was seen in the Gloomy Depths...

3061001.Content:
With a crisp snap, the chest opens. But inside is no treasure-just a note:
What isn't yours will eventually vanish.

3061101.Content: Not long after, Pell finished checking the gear in her backpack and explained how to use it to Phyllis. Phyllis taught Pell the secrets of fishing.

3062001.Content: After you whisper a few words to Magne and Pombo, they nod and run a short distance away. Serafina fiddles with her fingers, watching everything with a detached air.

3062002.Content: You wave, and Magne and Pombo dash back like swift little birds.

3062201.Content: Gracie hides behind a tree, taking off her favorite dress and changing into drab clothes that are easier to move in.

3062801.Content: After a patter of footsteps, the door opens.

3063001.Content: While Aubrey inspects the strange bird, Pani and Kabo tell him what happened this morning...

3063002.Content: The strange bird wobbles through the sky from the village direction.

3063101.Content: Everyone has pitched their tents near the fire. After the goodnights are said, only steady breathing remains...

3063103.Content: With a piercing cry, the giant bird leader climbs upward, and the flock drift farther away. The leader casts a long, solemn look at Sparrow before leading its kin into the night...

3063301.Content: Pheebo covers its eyes with the leaf on its head and runs off, looking very upset...

3063305.Content:
"Young one, why is it that we fish?"
Lure asks with a placid smile, betraying none of the frustration from when a fish slipped his hook moments before.
"Because the fish are there."

3063401.Content:
Afterwards, Cochran successfully strikes a deal with The Caravan.
Cochran avoided a hefty contract termination fee, and Aubrey's precious Caprahorns didn't lose their horns.
All in all, a happy ending...
I guess?

3063501.Content: After an endless wait, just as you're all about to doze off, a few sneaky figures creep along the wall, heading deeper into the Garrison Outpost...

3063502.Content:
The commotion from the fight quickly attracts the next shift of guards. The downcast soldier tells you to leave first while he handles things here.
You later learn that he received a commendation from the Corps for the incident. But was that a good thing or a bad thing?

3063701.Content:
You watch as the two little ones dart off like a flash.
Adrian keeps staring at the sky, refusing to look at Orlando, pretending nothing is happening.

3063901.Content:
The sudden situation startles both you and Zemirah, and Jolon hurriedly shuts down the device.
You all stand there in shock for a while, then rest briefly before gathering around the Engram Monitor to examine it.

3064001.Content: As Leonard finishes speaking, a long, clear cry echoes across the night sky over the Moonshadow Wilds...

3064002.Content:
Leonard forces his eyes wide open, yet the brush in his hand never comes down.
Perhaps his eyes have been strained from not blinking for too long, and now tears stream endlessly from his sockets...

3064003.Content: He falls silent, so you also keep quiet, until the Crimson Foxen leaves...

3064101.Content: Enjoy Rainbean Rice together with Alfonso...

3064201.Content:
"Wait! "
Someone suddenly darts out just as I try to approach the Caprahorn.
Even though he lowers his voice, the abrupt sound still breaks the forest's quiet.

3064202.Content: Two Foxens emerge quietly from the bushes, staring at the injured Caprahorn, their gazes filled with ferocity.

3064501.Content:
I measured the wall five times with a tape measure...
Something very strange occurred.
The reading was different every time.
Each time I released the tape and pulled it tight again,
the scale had shifted in a ghost-like manner...
Although this frightening discovery sent chills down my spine,
I still managed to complete the five measurements.

3064502.Content:
I measured the wall five times with a protractor...
The strange phenomenon occurred again. Despite placing it on the exact same corner,
whenever I moved the protractor then put it back,
the scale had shifted...

3064601.Content:
Marcel carefully disassembled the clockwork chicken
and modified the precision gears and clockwork mechanisms inside...

3064602.Content:
The experiment began, and the clockwork chicken walked towards the predetermined point.
However, its speed did not change significantly.

Just as everyone was looking disappointed,
the clockwork chicken suddenly vanished from the track.

Then two clockwork chickens appeared at the start and finish lines simultaneously!
—And a moment later, they merged back into one...

3064701.Content:
Julien and Marcel repeated the clockwork chicken experiment.
Unfortunately,
the bizarre splitting phenomenon did not occur this time...
The priest's expression grew even more solemn.

3064801.Content:
Afterwards, the Creed Priest had a long discussion with the artisan team leader.
The guards remained vigilant nearby, so I couldn't get close.
But at the same time, a strong wind blew through the camp, whipping up dead grass on the ground and tracing a vortex that resembled a triangle.
Occasionally, words like "memory" and "traces" were carried on the wind, only to quickly fade away...

When the meeting ended, both of their expressions were even more grave than when they arrived.

But regardless, the sensational Crimson Marrow incident
had finally come to an end—at least on the surface.

3064901.Content: After taking the herbs, her furrowed brow gradually relaxed, and her breathing steadied.

3065001.Content:
Flavia's hand trembled slightly
as she dropped the reverse reagent into the solution.

The solution grew slightly cloudy, then separated as if by an invisible hand.
A portion sank to the bottom, coagulating into fine crimson crystal fragments...
The other part remained suspended in the liquid, taking on a much darker hue.

3065101.Content:
Juster took out a narrow-necked vial and slowly passed it by his glasses.
When the vial approached the slender part of the right frame,
the crystal inside suddenly lit up with a bright yellow glow.

3065201.Content: Lorraine frantically opened her backpack to check, relaxing only after seeing its contents.

3065202.Content: I moved the girl to a safe corner. It wasn't long before she woke up from her unconscious state, seemingly without any serious injuries.

3065301.Content:
I stepped on a particularly soft patch of ground, but it was too late to turn back by the time I felt it. A figure lunged forward from behind me.
"Watch out!"

3065302.Content: Just as I was about to strike to ensure Adriana's safety, the Basilisk stopped and nudged the girl with its snout.

3065401.Content: The Crimson Foxen stared at you intently as it slowly backed away. It picked up the fallen foxen in its mouth and disappeared into the night with a few large bounds.

3065402.Content: You recounted the scene you just witnessed to Alfonso, and he fell silent...

3065601.Content: Schlange listened silently to your account...

3065602.Content: Konrad frowned as he listened to your account, sighing from time to time...

3065603.Content: After handing the letter to Konrad, you left the area...

3066201.Content: You made a quick dash back to hand the Starsoul Flask over to the villagers. After using it, Taliesin's condition seemed to improve significantly...

3066401.Content: With some assistance, the artisans finally pinned Varian down in a flurry and used the Starsoul Flask on him. After a long while, he began to regain consciousness...

3910302.Content:
The emotional Julian falls silent.
Only the sounds of the wind, the chirping of insects,
and the paint-covered brush on canvas remain.

A long time passes... then a cry of surprise breaks the silence...

3911701.Content:
Lushuna sang an a cappella tidal tune on the spot. Not just me, but other tourists on the beach stopped to listen.
The song was melodious and moving, carrying the unique gentleness and vastness of the ocean.
It felt as if the tide rose and fell with the melody, melting the freshness of the sea breeze and the weight of the reefs into his voice...

4050002.Content: Luca grabbed the money and dashed away...

4050003.Content:
The villagers, still in shock, kept their distance from me.
It seemed they'd rather walk along the dangerous cliff edge than get close...
Lysa babbled nonsense the whole way, bursting into tears at the mere mention of Boyce.
After much trouble, I finally managed to escort them back to their homes...

4050004.Content: Horrace, Lothar, and their party left...

4050005.Content:
The boss lady left.
I felt like I could hear faint, hearty laughter coming from the direction she went...

4050006.Content:
Boyce began skillfully brewing the potion...
A strange fragrance filled the air,
like the scent of dew at dawn,
or damp earth after a rainshower,
finally condensing into the freshness of an insect flitting past one's nose...

4050007.Content:
Boyce closed his eyes and began to meditate...
After a while, Olsonne was the first to wake up.

4050008.Content:
With Olsonne taken away by the cultists,
the Dreamweaver incident came to a close.
But the truth of the matter,
like the light that once shone in Boyce's eyes,
was frozen once more...
After that,
I didn't see Boyce for a long time.
Perhaps I will never again see
that heat amid the frost.

4050009.Content:
Boyce held the dim staff in front of him.
Without hesitation, he made a motion with both hands,
and with a crisp snap, the staff broke in two.
The Creed soldiers swarmed in
and took Boyce away...
Because of my connection with the Pioneer Bureau,
they didn't give me much trouble.
Boyce didn't appear again for a long time after that,
but the news that he would be judged by the Creed
had already spread...

4050011.Content: ...Only when one no longer fears falling can one learn to fly.

4050012.Content: (Boyce took a doll out of his pocket.)

4050013.Content:
Once you regain consciousness, a golden field of wheat spreads out before you.
The breeze is gentle, and the outlines of a high tower and a steel giant are faintly visible in the distance.

4050101.Content:
Darya and I found the person in charge of the Blackstone Legion and explained the situation.
The leader was astounded and immediately led his men to resolve the issue.
Only after the soldiers were settled did we plan to ask about the full story.

4050102.Content:
I parted ways with Darya after that, though I occasionally hear news of her working hard to earn Luno.
Sometimes, she sends mementos from the plateau where she's hard at work, telling me that everything is going well for her.

4050103.Content:
Some time later, I received another letter from Darya.
With the note was a drawing of a little figure in pain. She said that she had fallen ill and urgently needed a kind adventurer to care for her.
I rushed over, only to find her sitting on her bed, looking listless.

4050201.Content:
Since then, Fafala has refused to even look at me.
When the village chief returned, I quietly left.
... I hope she gets well soon.

4050202.Content:
Her world seemed to be swallowed by fog once again.
No matter what I said, Fafala wouldn't answer.
By the time Chief Alphonse returned, I was already standing at the door.
... I hope that one day, I can see her smile again.

4050203.Content: I reached under the bed and felt a tiny object hanging from the bed board.

4050301.Content:
Magne seemed to have finally let go of a long-held worry. She waved as she ran into the distance and soon disappeared at the other end of the village.
Now, only Airona and I remained.

4050302.Content:
Belleet finished speaking and slowly walked away.
I stood under the tree, her words ringing in my mind.
About the moonlight, about the flower that blooms only once...

Before I knew it, the sky had darkened.
When I came to, a familiar figure was standing by the Sea Lily under the tree.

5010301.Content:
Rose saw the little kitten under the tree and called out to it with soft "meows."
The kitten trotted over and rubbed against Rose, meowing softly.
Before long, Rose came back to my side and nudged me to follow it.

5013101.Content: "Come! Let's see if you have the power to discern that light!"

5013201.Content: "Come! You must find the item that still shines even when it is as old as the ancient Renewal Light!"

10010401.Content:
The Man in Black disappeared into the Void Engram.
By the time I regained consciousness, I was already back in reality.

10050501.Content:
Time keeps slipping away, yet Airona still hasn't shown up.
Standing around won't help... I should go look for her.

10050502.Content:
Afterwards Airona and I let Jerrad know we are safe and return to the Double-Faced Coin.
After all the tension and chaos, we can finally take a breather.

10050503.Content:
I still don't understand what the drifting mist truly means.
Nor do I know how the highlands are connected to these strange events.

Why Airona got trapped in an illusion and what she saw within it remain a mystery.

10060301.Content: Taylor leaves with a stiff expression. His arrival was abrupt; his departure even more so.

10080101.Content: The door creaked open. A hand shot out, groped quickly, grabbed the supplies, and whooshed back.

10080103.Content: And so, Darya's work as a guide came to an end.

10080221.Content:
I close my eyes, my fingertips gently brushing the outer shell of the Engram Monitor.
The coldness seeps through my skin, crawling swiftly up my arm.
An instant later, I detect a faint pulse. It starts as a steady wave, but deep within, I can feel nearly invisible fractures.
I hold my breath, tracing the fissure to investigate further.
But then, I sense another familiar energy, potent and dangerous, flowing silently...
It pulsates in perfect sync with the Crimson Marrow.

10080403.Content:
The atmosphere in this district is so uncomfortable. It feels like standing here means there's an endless amount of work to be done.
If Jerrad doesn't get here soon, it's probably fine if I just take off, right?

17021001.Content:
I boarded the cruise with Luyanis.
The ship slowly left the shore, the sea breeze brushing my cheeks with a damp chill.
Mist soon swallowed the beach behind us, leaving only the sound of waves and the ship's movement.

I don't know how much time passed before the fog gradually lifted. A strange and brilliant island floated before my eyes like a dream.

17100106.Content:
The engine rumbled as the ship slowly departed the Port of Asterleeds.
Along the way, stars twinkled in the night sky, jellyfish glowed faintly in the Abyssal, and seagulls circled and cried above the stern.

As the sky began to lighten, an island came into view.
Connor gave the order to halt. We lowered the lifeboats and rowed toward the misty island.

17100112.Content:
On the return journey, the sea mist still hadn't cleared.

The island slowly faded into the thick fog behind us as if it had never existed.

In the distance, the Port of Asterleeds appeared in the morning light.

Figures moved on the dock, and as the ropes were thrown ashore, I looked back at the sea.
The mist still hung low, and that island had long since vanished into the deep blue.

17100114.Content:
Some time later, Connor sent word through someone:
"The island construction is roughly completed. You may visit for inspection when available.
Just show your Ocean Platinum Card to the staff at the dock. "

17100301.Content:
Some time later, the architectural artisans arrived on the island with various tools and swiftly began work.
Under Connor's supervision, the house expansion was completed in a very short time.

17100401.Content: The architectural artisans once again modified the house...

17100501.Content:
Under Connor's supervision,
the artisans efficiently completed the first phase of island expansion...

17100601.Content:
The artisans worked with great ease...
The second phase of construction was also smoothly completed.

17100701.Content:
Having fully grasped the process, the artisans completed the final expansion just as smoothly.
Connor high-fived each artisan who helped build the island...
Now, every part of the island is fully accessible.

30015301.Content:
He crouched down and started digging with his hands.
Soon, he unearthed a box with a letter inside.

30070801.Content: Moved the heavy Golem elsewhere with the other scavengers in the camp...

30070802.Content: Some time later, 6 people in black appeared in sight...

30070803.Content:
Huskstar's right hand lifted instantly, and a miniature Legacy flew from his hand.
The Legacy arced gracefully through the air and landed near the place where the Golem was hidden.
But aside from a noticeable arc of electricity, nothing else happened...

30270202.Content: (Explain to the clerk where the problem is.)

30420101.Content: After some more catching up, the two, who hadn't seen each other in years, chatted more and more enthusiastically...

30812001.Content:
The Creed Guards came to Sunset Wilds and took the mysterious Masked Man away.
After some time, I went to ask about the results of the interrogation...

30812002.Content:
Just as I was about to continue asking questions, I noticed another merchant nearby gesturing to me.
So I decided to go over and ask...

30813001.Content:
No matter how much I called out to the little Caprahorn, it remained indifferent.
It even took a fighting stance when approached, displaying its wild nature.

30813002.Content:
I found Heremon and took him to the little Caprahorn.
But no matter how much he called out, it remained highly agitated and primed to attack.

30818001.Content:
Just as I spoke, birds scattered from the forest, and a heavy, low growl came from behind.
At the same time, thousands of gazes flickered among the trees—it was a herd of Caprahorn hiding in the woods.

30818002.Content: Thanks to the adventurers' close cooperation, the giant Flamehorn slowly retreated back into the forest, and the gazes of the thousands of Caprahorn vanished.

30837001.Content:
Shrouded in darkness, a terrifying willpower swept over you,
overwhelming you with an irresistible drowsiness.
You lost consciousness...

30839001.Content:
The Blackstone Legion Soldier left quickly after finishing speaking,
leaving only an unguarded silhouette...

31101001.Content:
No one expected the grand prize to be working as a staff member on Starland.
I spent the whole day busy—handing out balloons, guiding crowds, operating attractions, and doing other random tasks...
In the end, I was exhausted, lying catatonic on the beach. Maybe the person who won this super-special reward knew what the prize entailed, and that's why...

31105001.Content:
After the Lost and Found broadcast, a lady came looking for one of the items, calling herself Nyx.
She said she was Ometawi's companion and was sent to pick it up before describing the letter's features perfectly.

31107001.Content: The children excitedly hid in the nearby Cherry Blossom Forest...

31110001.Content:
Tachi-Tachi relished the lamb chops, eating with gusto.
Boto's face squeezed itself into a forced smile,
as if he were enduring a tragic battle...
Finally, under the supervision of the Starland staff,
Boto and Tachi-Tachi left the island.

31110002.Content:
Special lamb chop held tightly in his arms,
Boto left Starland with Tachi-Tachi.
There was still a hint of roast meat in the wind,
but it was soon overpowered by the scent of the sea.

31110003.Content:
At Boto's insistence,
the staff was forced to helplessly watch Tachi-Tachi gorge himself.
A triumphant smile adorned Boto's face the entire time,
as if he had won an unprecedented victory.
After Tachi-Tachi had eaten his fill, Boto thanked you profusely
and took Tachi-Tachi for a walk on the beach.

33000201.Content:
"3, 2, 1—"
An intense light flooded the entire cave...

33000401.Content:
Some time ago

Asteria Plains - Outside the Ruins of Andra City - The Creed's Camp

33062403.Content: You told them everything that had happened...

33062404.Content: Heath uses gestures to explain what happened, and you nod along, adding some of the finer details...

33062405.Content: You tell the administrator the whole story, with Heath nodding along and adding details...

33062406.Content: You tell the clerk in charge the whole story...

33062407.Content: You tell the quiet miner the whole story...

33062408.Content: You tell Grieg everything that happened...

33062409.Content:
"I'm sorry, everyone..."
"Ah, finally... I can go home..."

33251501.Content:
The kitten doesn't reject your affection, but you notice its gaze is still fixed on something in the distance.
So, dissatisfied, you use both hands...

33251503.Content: As you all chat, the sky slowly darkens, and the children head home one by one...

33251504.Content:
The corrupted monster has been defeated, and the villagers gradually gather around.
Pearl and Nimbus both suffered some superficial wounds, but thankfully, they're not serious...

33340201.Content: (Clean up the Goblin-vandalized cemetery with Feliz.)

33340202.Content:
Feliz holds out the letter with both hands, his fingers trembling nonstop.
Alphonse takes the letter. He says nothing, just gives Feliz a deep, profound look, then turns and vanishes into the darkness of the night.

33350801.Content: Gently stroke the leaf on Nappo's head.

33350802.Content: The cat-loving clerk cautiously extends his hand, but Beebo takes the initiative to nuzzle his palm. It's clear that Beebo is happy to be petted by humans.

33350803.Content: Before you even reach out, Beebo perks up its leaf expectantly. It's clear that Beebo is happy to be petted by humans.

33351201.Content: (Tell Maire about the difficulties Triffin is facing.)

33360301.Content: (Tell Hebard about the exciting chase with the Swift Eagle.)

33360302.Content: (Tell Varnell the whole story of the raid on the Goblin camp and the exciting chase with the Swift Eagle.)

33420101.Content: Despite what you said, you grab his clothes and leap lightly back to the ground...

33450201.Content: Holmes has barely finished speaking when a monster's roar echoes from nearby...

33450202.Content: A long wait ensues, during which Holmes continuously holds Walson's hand, muttering to himself...

33540101.Content: Cochran closes his eyes, a little expectant and a little shy. He puckers his lips slightly and slowly leans toward the male Caprahorn, which is flicking its tail helplessly...

33540102.Content:
Isabella bites her finger, dabbing a fiery crimson drop of blood on Cochran's forehead.
In an instant, Cochran quiets down, trembling like a frightened animal.

33540104.Content: You can't believe the sound of a hand hitting a face could be so loud, and you can't help but applaud.

33540105.Content: After you tell Cochran what he did while under the influence of the Illusory Bloom, he falls silent for a long time...

33540107.Content:
Afterwards, to soothe Cochran's wounded soul, Isabella grants him the publishing rights to the short story collection.
But knowing what's in the book, he probably has mixed feelings about it...

50070001.Content:
The mysterious figure abruptly vanishes before your very eyes, as if they were never there.
But your conversation drives you to join this insane treasure hunt...

50070002.Content: I took a deep breath, braced myself, and dived down, bringing up the sparkling object.

60904241.Content:
You taste the stone-wheat flatbread with Caprahorn meat made by Anemone, but you can't chew the crust no matter how hard you try.
Anemone went to great lengths to salvage the texture of the ingredients, but it's clear her efforts were all for nothing.

3067201.Content: A weapon was hurriedly drawn, ready for battle—only to see the Ridge Fang headbutt the thrown spherical object. It was clearly playing around with the newcomer.

3067202.Content: The Ridge Fang also relaxed and lay down amidst the music at the side, looking as if it was about to fall asleep.
